title: End Remastered Additions
description: Expands on End Remastered by adding new unique eyes.
body:
End Remastered Additions is an addon for the [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) mod, expanding it by adding new eyes.

![image of all five eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bdb3fdc38f6ffa24cc0bbfec47c5892004ad808.png)

How to get them:

1. **Fishing Eye** - 2% chance to drop while fishing.

2. **Trial Eye** - Received as a reward from the [Ominous Vault](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ominous_Vault) in the Trial Chambers.

3. **Sculk Eye** - Found in chests in the Ancient City with a 4% chance.

4. **Potato Eye** - 0.02% chance to drop from a ripe potato (age 7).

5. **Blossom Eye** - Received by killing Void Blossom (requires [BOMD](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction)).

6. **Aether Eye** (not in the picture) - Find them in the ruined Aether portals (requires [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)).
